cit.basis: Standard 30% CIT under the Income Tax Act (Cap. 323, as amended), administered by the Zambia Revenue Authority (ZRA).
cit.note: 10% applies to income from farming and agro-processing; 15% to hotel/tourism income from accommodation and food services (remaining income taxed at the standard rate). Mining companies fall under a variable-profit tax regime with mineral royalties — out of scope for this SME estimator.

turnover_tax.note: 5% turnover tax applies to businesses with annual turnover up to K5,000,000 that are not registered for CIT; out of scope for this SME estimator.

mineral_royalty.note: Mineral royalty is levied on mining production at price-graduated rates (copper on a sliding scale by LME price); mining income is also subject to a variable-profit CIT regime. Out of scope for this SME estimator.

vat.note: 16% standard VAT; exports and certain supplies are zero-rated, with exemptions per the VAT Act.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Sector regimes (hotels/tourism split rates, mining variable-profit tax, mineral royalty, turnover tax), WHT and relief rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
